subtask: Summarize 10 Tableau dashboards into 6 stakeholder-ready insights for a Monthly Business Review using GPT

items.title: awesome-chatgpt-prompts
items.snippet: A Python repository: This repo includes ChatGPT prompt curation to use ChatGPT and other LLM tools better.
items.reflection: - adjacent: the content is related as it deals with prompt curation which could be useful for the pm in understanding how to better use gpt-4. however, it does not directly address the specific task of summarizing tableau dashboards into stakeholder-ready insights. the pm might need more specific guidance on how to use ai for data analysis and reporting workflows.
items.description: A Python repository: This repo includes ChatGPT prompt curation to use ChatGPT and other LLM tools better.
items.why: "Awesome-chatgpt-prompts" is a highly useful Python repository that can significantly enhance your proficiency in prompt engineering. This resource will guide you on how to effectively curate prompts for ChatGPT and other Language Model tools. The knowledge gained will be particularly beneficial in your project of generating insight-ready slides for Monthly Business Reviews in healthcare claims. By leveraging AI, you can automate the creation of these slides, reducing manual intervention and increasing efficiency. Mastering prompt engineering can help you instruct the AI more
